Name: Girls Full Length Sustainable High Waist Leggings
Description:
Description:
Adorable high waisted recycled leggings made for your little ones, with the softest breathable fabric and elastic waistband. Providing ultimate comfort throughout the entire day for your girls. A 100% sustainable essential in their wardrobe!

Our recycled fabric:
Made from 83% recycled polyester and 17% spandex providing the softest touch to the skin, while feeling ultra-lightweight. From post-consumer recycled plastic bottles, turned into a new reusable and sustainable fabric. The fabric is extremely durable, strong, and 100% recyclable. Recycled polyester is highly eco-friendly, combating the rise of plastic waste in our world.

How I am made
83% recycled polyester and 17% spandex
All trims, labels, threads, and Dying Process are eco-friendly and sustainable.

Designed and made in UAE.

How to take care of me
Can be washed by hand or washing machine on cold to hot water, using a mild detergent on a delicate cycle.

Name: Women's Sustainable Every Body Crop T-Shirt
Description:
Description:
An elevated flattering crop shirt, ideal for a night out or when lounging around. Made from recycled polyester and spandex, these ultra-comfortable breathable cropped shirts can be combined with sweatpants or shorts for elevated luxurious look.

Our recycled fabric:
Made from 83% recycled polyester and 17% spandex providing the softest touch to the skin, while feeling ultra-lightweight. From post-consumer recycled plastic bottles, turned into a new reusable and sustainable fabric. The fabric is extremely durable, strong, and 100% recyclable. Recycled polyester is highly eco-friendly, combating the rise of plastic waste in our world.

How I am made
83% recycled polyester and 17% spandex
All trims, labels, threads, and Dying Process are eco-friendly and sustainable.

Designed and made in UAE.

How to take care of me
Can be washed by hand or washing machine on cold to hot water, using a mild detergent on a delicate cycle.

Name: Organic Bamboo Women Oversized Cozy Half Zip Jumper
Description:
Description:
This ultra-soft long sleeve women's jumper is made from organic Bamboo, giving you the most beautiful, fitted shape for everyday! This beautiful pullover is lightweight and breathable so you can wear it all day, from day to night. The oversized fit and the soft to skin feel provide the most ultimate comfort for both men and women.

Our organic bamboo:
Only made from 100% organic bamboo, from well-selected non-polluted grown bamboo. No harmful chemicals whatsoever are used during growth, making the textile material eco-friendly, biodegradable, and sustainable. Bamboo is known for its anti-bacterial and excellent breathability properties, making it fresh for longer: washed less often-saving water, energy, and time.

How I am made
95% organic cotton & bamboo fleece with 5% Spandex
All trims, labels, threads, and Dying Process are eco-friendly and sustainable.

Designed and made in UAE.

How to take care of me
Bamboo products are premium quality and it needs some care
Machine wash cold
Tumble dry gently
Hang dry in shade, do not wring
Low temperature drying if needed, do not exceed 35¬†degree celsius
Do not bleach
Cold Ironing (steam iron less than 100 degree celsius)
Do not expose to great sun

Name: Organic Bamboo Women Oversized Cozy Half Zip Jumper
Description:
Description:
This ultra-soft long sleeve women's jumper is made from organic Bamboo, giving you the most beautiful, fitted shape for everyday! This beautiful pullover is lightweight and breathable so you can wear it all day, from day to night. The oversized fit and the soft to skin feel provide the most ultimate comfort for both men and women.

Our organic bamboo:
Only made from 100% organic bamboo, from well-selected non-polluted grown bamboo. No harmful chemicals whatsoever are used during growth, making the textile material eco-friendly, biodegradable, and sustainable. Bamboo is known for its anti-bacterial and excellent breathability properties, making it fresh for longer: washed less often-saving water, energy, and time.

How I am made
95% organic cotton & bamboo fleece with 5% Spandex
All trims, labels, threads, and Dying Process are eco-friendly and sustainable.

Designed and made in UAE.

How to take care of me
Bamboo products are premium quality and it needs some care
Machine wash cold
Tumble dry gently
Hang dry in shade, do not wring
Low temperature drying if needed, do not exceed 35¬†degree celsius
Do not bleach
Cold Ironing (steam iron less than 100 degree celsius)
Do not expose to great sun

Description

Description:
¬†

THE WORLDS FIRST COCONUT SUSTAINABLE BLENDER

The world‚Äôs first sustainable beauty sponge made from coconut! A reusable, eco-friendly high-definition beauty sponge made from 40% coconut fibers, designed for perfectly flawless complexion.

What it does:¬†

Made from 40% coconut fibers, this one of a kind eco-friendly beauty blender features a beautiful shape that guarantees a perfect, streak-free application with minimum product waste. The Coconut Blender is the softest sponge you will try, putting less pressure on your delicate kin! Use with primers, foundations, powders and any other complexion product, and your face has never looked this flawless.

Cruelty-Free. Vegan. Sustainable. Functional. Unisex

How to use:

- Wet coconut sponge with water

- Squeeze out the excess water

- Bounce primer, foundation, powder or any other complexion product across the face.

- Flawless results are yours in no time!

What else you need to know:

Made with coconut fibers and an open cell structure, the eco-friendly sponge¬†fills with small amounts of water when wet. This allows this latex-free sponge to be ‚Äúfull‚Äù so that the makeup product sits on top of the sponge instead of being absorbed, allowing you to use less product every time. When wet,¬†sponge doubles in size, becoming even softer and then returns to its original size when it air dries.

Coconut Eco-Friendly Blender¬†uses safe, water-soluble dyes that do not harm the environment and help maintain the integrity of their proprietary foam.

THE ESSENTIAL MAGNETIC EYELINER

The most powerful magnetic eyeliner technology that will revolutionize your beauty routine! Apply eyeliner and eyelashes in one go!¬†

What it does:

Extremely easy application and complete your eyelashes and liner within 3 seconds only!¬† The Magnetic Eyeliner is glue free but holds your Magnetic Lashes down perfectly! The latex-free liner allows your Magnetic Lashes to sit perfectly on top of your own lashes! The liner will not smudge or flake, perfect for everyone: from beginners to pros!

Cruelty-Free. Vegan. Functional. Unisex

How to use

  • Apply a thin layer of the Magnetic Eyeliner across your lash line

  • Apply the Magnetic Lashes on top of the eyeliner

  • The Magnetic Lash will stick to the liner in one

  • Adjust placement if necessary

Name: GL Active - Women's Sustainable Zipper Bra
Description:
Description:


This GL active women's sustainable zipper bra is designed to provide ultimate support for all women while being highly eco-friendly. The recycled material feels buttery-soft providing you with incredible comfort day and night. The long line fit provides extra support making it even more comfortable to wear. Your new go to bra in our innovative environmentally friendly fabric!

Our recycled fabric:

Made from 83% recycled polyester and 17% spandex provides the softest touch to the skin, while feeling ultra-lightweight. From post-consumer recycled plastic bottles, turned into a new reusable and sustainable fabric. The fabric is extremely durable, strong, and 100% recyclable. Recycled polyester is very eco-friendly, combating the rise of plastic waste in our world.

How I am made

83% recycled polyester and 17% spandex
All trims, labels, threads and dying process are eco-friendly and sustainable.
Designed and made in UAE.

How to take care of me

Can be washed by hand or washing machine on cold to hot water, using a mild detergent on a delicate cycle.

Name: Organic Bamboo Boys Lounge Shorts
Description:
Description

These organic bamboo shorts for both boys and girls are an essential in your children's wardrobe A high-waisted fit, above the knee length, and the softest to skin touch — a must-have in your kids' collection

Our Organic Bamboo

Only made from 100% organic bamboo, sourced from well-selected, non-polluted farms No harmful chemicals are used during growth, making the fabric eco-friendly, biodegradable, and sustainable Bamboo is naturally anti-bacterial and highly breathable, helping the fabric stay fresh longer and reducing the need for frequent washing — saving water, energy, and time

How I Am Made

  • 95% organic cotton & bamboo fleece
  • 5% spandex
  • All trims, labels, threads, and dyeing process are eco-friendly and sustainable

Designed and made proudly in the UAE

How to Take Care of Me

  • Machine wash cold
  • Tumble dry gently
  • Hang dry in shade — do not wring
  • Low-temperature drying if needed (max 35°C)
  • Do not bleach
  • Steam iron on low (under 100°C)
  • Keep away from strong direct sunlight

Description:
Description

These organic bamboo shorts for both boys and girls are an essential in your children's wardrobe A high-waisted fit, above the knee length, and the softest to skin touch — a must-have in your kids' collection

Our Organic Bamboo

Only made from 100% organic bamboo, sourced from well-selected, non-polluted farms No harmful chemicals are used during growth, making the fabric eco-friendly, biodegradable, and sustainable Bamboo is naturally anti-bacterial and highly breathable, helping the fabric stay fresh longer and reducing the need for frequent washing — saving water, energy, and time

  • Machine wash cold
  • Tumble dry gently
  • Hang dry in shade — do not wring
  • Low-temperature drying if needed (max 35°C)
  • Do not bleach
  • Steam iron on low (under 100°C)
  • Keep away from strong direct sunlight
